caption: A man sits in a studio setting for a podcast, wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT!!" printed in white, a black baseball cap with a silver emblem, and over-ear headphones. He wears a gold chain with a pendant around his neck. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background is white with gold stars and the words "GRIND HUSTLE" repeated vertically. To his right, a red and black logo reads "BOSS TALK 101". A smaller logo in the bottom left corner reads "BOSS TALK PODCAST". Across the sequence, the man is speaking, his mouth opening and closing as he delivers a point. His head shifts slightly as he talks, while the rest of the scene, including the equipment and background elements, remains static.
